headers.value: default-src 'self' https://*.firebaseapp.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.gstatic.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://*.firebaseapp.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.googleusercontent.com https://images.unsplash.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.firebaseapp.com https://*.googleapis.com wss://*.googleapis.com; frame-src 'self' https://*.firebaseapp.com; object-src 'none';
